h1. Context Plane and Agent Layer

h2. Purpose

Provide enterprise context and orchestration to improve search planning, interpretation, answer quality, and metadata enrichment.

h2. Context Components

* Acronyms Loader
* Business Alias Manager
* Historical Q&A
* User Bookmarks
* Human Feedback
* Self Evaluation
* Context Plane MCP

h2. Agents

|| Agent || Responsibility ||
| Supervisor Agent | Routes question to correct retrieval flow |
| Structured Discovery Agent | Converts vague user requests into structured search plans |
| Metadata Enrichment Agent | Suggests descriptions, tags, mappings, or relationship improvements |
| Lineage Analysis Agent | Handles impact and dependency questions |
| Governance Agent | Handles classification, ownership, and policy questions |
| Answer Evaluation Agent | Checks answer grounding and quality |

h2. Requirements

|| ID || Requirement || Priority ||
| CTX-001 | Load acronyms | P1 |
| CTX-002 | Store historical Q&A | P1 |
| CTX-003 | Support user bookmarks | P2 |
| CTX-004 | Capture human feedback | P1 |
| CTX-005 | Build Supervisor Agent | P1 |
| CTX-006 | Build Structured Discovery Agent | P1 |
| CTX-007 | Build Metadata Enrichment Agent | P2 |
| CTX-008 | Add self-evaluation | P2 |

h2. Success Criteria

* Acronyms improve search interpretation.
* Historical Q&A is available but does not override source metadata.
* Bookmarks can influence ranking.
* Feedback is captured and reviewable.
* Agents choose the correct retrieval strategy.

h2. Pitfalls / Risks

|| Risk || Impact || Mitigation ||
| Context plane overrides authoritative metadata | Incorrect answers | Treat context as assistive only |
| Feedback is not reviewed | Ranking quality stagnates | Create feedback review process |
| Agents become too complex too early | Delivery risk | Build search service first; agents thinly orchestrate |
| Metadata enrichment updates source directly | Governance risk | Require human approval workflow |
